productDisplayName: Asics Men's Gel Challenger 8 Tennis White Blue Shoe
description: AN ACE FOR THE ACERS Your quest for the most comfortable tennis shoe has come to an end with the Gel Challenger 8 from asics. The perfect shoe for the diehard tennis fan, the asics Gel Challenger 8 comes with great durability and traction, besides smart colours that make it a cross between a fashionable lifestyle shoe and a country club conservative. Offering utmost grip and stability on hard tennis courts, the support of the inner arch of medial region of the foot in the Asics Gel Challenger 8 is to-die-for. Engineered with firm gel cushioning, it is an extremely comfortable and non-compromising tennis shoe. It has a durable rubber outsole and in structured for lightweight comfort.   Get aggressive in style The Asics Gel Challenger 8 ensures high performance for aggressive players. Constructed with a standard length and medium Fit and arch, the upper of this shoe is constructed using synthetic leather and a polyester-based mesh for enhanced ventilation and dry-fit comfort. There is a PGuard employed at the toe area to improve durability, and a personal Heel Fit collar that locks the heel in place and provides added comfort and impact protection to the heel. The ankle receives co much comfort and support that you can keep your ankle supports away and comfortably slip into the Asics Challenger 8 shoe. Side-to-side movement made easy The midsole of the shoe is employed with the Asics Gel Cushioning system for that extra comfort that protects the feet from impact during a competitive game of tennis. Injected with Solyte 55 inserts, the midsole is made all the more lighter than the Asics standard EVA or SpEVA footbeds. This offers improved cushioning and durability, along with a speed oriented feel making it extremely easy for tennis players to make those side-to-side movements. The rearfoot and forefoot offers ample cushioning and support in the right points of the foot, protecting the feet completely from shock.   Modified tread for great traction The outsole of the Asics Gel Challenger 8 is made of Asics High Abrasion Resistant Rubber or AHAR for increased durability. Created using a modified tread pattern, this tennis shoe provides non-marking traction on all court surfaces. The forefoot and rearfoot and joined together by a plastic shank called the Trusstic System that offers excellent midfoot support, allowing ample traction across various surfaces. This plastic shank doesn't touch the ground and instead wraps neatly around the inner arch of the foot, providing distinct grip and support for good court movement.   A great shoe for the hardcore tennis buff, the Asics Gel Challenger 8 works best without thick socks as the heel seat is slightly low. So gear up, step into these wondrous shoes and surprise yourself with those winning aces. Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
